title: map fixed length to variable
text: map fixed length to variable Map fields with a fixed length storage format (CHAR) to a variable length storage format. USYS$PGS_PARAMS = map fixed length to variable :on | off USYS$PGS_PARAMS = fv:on | off Description If the setting is not specified, it defaults to off . This setting can greatly reduce the disk space required for large table sets. However, it may also reduce the database performance by 20%-50%.
